trust_badges.badge_1: Ranked #3 Pool Service in the Nation

hero.headline: 35 Years Keeping Chester County Pool Perfect
hero.subheadline: Great Valley Pool Service has been the name Chester County families trust since 1991. With 25 service trucks and a nationally ranked team, we handle your pool so you can simply enjoy it.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care and<br class="hidden md:block"> So Much More
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to equipment repair to holiday lights, Great Valley keeps your home looking its best year-round.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Recurring weekly, bi-weekly, or deluxe service plans that keep your pool clean, safe, and chemically balanced all season long.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Professional seasonal summerizing and winterizing with full equipment inspection, chemical balancing, and cover service. 1,500+ pools every year.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Install
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of all brands — pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, and cleaners. Most repairs completed same-visit.

cards.title: Free Water Testing
cards.description: Computerized in-store water analysis with personalized chemical recommendations. Walk in anytime for a free, precise test.

cards.title: Custom Awnings & Shades
cards.description: Retractable awnings, window shades, shelters, and stationary canopies for residential and commercial properties. Sales, install, and service.

cards.title: Holiday Lights & Decor
cards.description: Professional holiday decoration design, installation, maintenance, and takedown with off-season storage. Residential and commercial.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool Season

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Estimate
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and what you need. We will provide an honest, no-pressure quote and find the service plan that fits your family.

steps.title: Our Team Takes Over
steps.description: One of our 25 fully-equipped trucks arrives on schedule. Our experienced technicians handle cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — everything.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season. If anything is ever off, we come back and make it right — that is our promise.

about.label: Why Chester County Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Nationally Ranked, Locally Loved
about.description: Tracy and Cecil Bond started Great Valley Pool Service in 1991 with one truck and a commitment to doing things right. Today we operate 25 service trucks, maintain over 400 pools weekly, and open or close more than 1,500 pools every season. Pool and Spa News ranked us the #3 Pool Service Company in the Nation — but what matters most is that our neighbors trust us with their backyards year after year.

features.title: 25 Trucks, Fast Response
features.description: Our fleet of 25 fully-equipped service trucks means we can get to your pool quickly and handle any issue on the spot.

features.title: Year-Round Service Team
features.description: Pool care in summer, awnings in spring, holiday lights in winter. We are your one-call solution for every season.

features.title: Free Pool School Classes
features.description: We offer free pool school sessions twice a year so you can learn water chemistry basics and get the most out of your pool.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your pool and your budget. Upgrade, downgrade, or change anytime — we keep it simple.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we will return to make it right at no extra charge. We have built our reputation over 35 years by standing behind every job. Your satisfaction is not just a policy — it is why we are ranked among the best in the nation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within one week. For urgent issues like a green pool or equipment failure, we offer priority response. Just call our Frazer office and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Chester County, Delaware County, New Castle County, and the entire Main Line area of Pennsylvania. Our 25 service trucks cover a wide radius from our Frazer headquarters.

faqs.question: Do you offer free water testing?
faqs.answer: Yes! Bring a water sample to our retail store in Frazer anytime. Our computerized water testing system provides precise results and personalized chemical treatment recommendations — completely free.

faqs.question: Do you only service pools?
faqs.answer: We also specialize in custom awnings and professional holiday lighting. This means we can keep your home looking great year-round — pools in summer, shade in spring, and holiday decor in winter.

faqs.question: What makes Great Valley different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We have been family-owned since 1991, operate 25 service trucks, and were ranked the #3 Pool Service Company in the Nation by Pool and Spa News. We also offer free pool school classes, a full retail store, and an online shop with curbside pickup.

testimonials.name: Long-time Customer
testimonials.text: I have used Great Valley Pools for 16 years with always impeccable service. They quickly adjust to customer preferences and provide repairs in a timely manner.

testimonials.name: Runner G.
testimonials.text: Goes above and beyond. I really appreciated the services provided by this team. They are there when you need them.

testimonials.name: Shane M.
testimonials.text: I have used these guys for a couple of years now, I find them to be a joy to work with. One of the best pool companies in the area — five-star service compared to others.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool You
Never Worry About?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from Chester County's most trusted pool team. Over 35 years of experience, 511+ five-star reviews, and a nationally ranked team behind every service call.

footer.description: Family-owned pool service, awnings, and holiday lighting. Serving Chester County and the Main Line since 1991.
